title: The Defense Secretary Killed Over UFOs (Ft. Richard Dolan)
summary: Jesse Michels interviews UFO historian Richard Dolan, discussing his journey into UFO research, the concept of a 'breakaway civilization' funded by unaccounted government expenditures, the MJ-12 documents controversy, and Dolan's extensive research into Unidentified Submersible Objects (USOs) spanning 200 years of documented cases.

acronyms.definition: Alleged secret committee formed to manage UFO-related information and crash retrievals
Unidentified objects observed entering, exiting, or traveling through water
US government department responsible for housing policy
United States federal department responsible for military and national security
Relating to electromagnetic interference reported in UFO/USO encounters

events.description: HMS Blonde crew witnessed orange spherical object rise from ocean near Cook Islands, documented by naturalist Andrew Bloxam
Magenta crash in Italy, allegedly connected to James Jesus Angleton's father Hugh Angleton who was stationed there
USS Delarof crew witnessed disc-shaped USO emerge from water near Adak Island in the Aleutians
USS John F. Kennedy aircraft carrier encountered glowing orange orb that caused electromagnetic interference and weapons systems to go offline
Mario Woods abduction case at Ellsworth Air Force Base, with Richard Doty present at debriefing
MJ-12 documents first appeared, allegedly sent from near Kirtland Air Force Base
Richard Dolan was in Berlin during the fall of the Berlin Wall while studying German history
Richard Dolan discovered Timothy Good's 'Above Top Secret' book and began UFO research
John Peterson invited Katherine Austin Fitz to Arlington Institute conference to discuss extraterrestrials living among us
Donald Rumsfeld announced $2.3 trillion in unaccounted Pentagon expenditures before House Armed Services Committee

key_claims.claim: The B2 Stealth Bomber incorporated principles of electrogravitics based on Thomas Townsend Brown's work
A retired Air Force colonel who worked on the B2 project reacted strongly when asked about electrogravitics, suggesting the claim was sensitive and possibly true
James Jesus Angleton's father Hugh Angleton was stationed in Italy at the time of the 1933 Magenta crash
Richard Doty's father was deeply involved in Area 51 and UFOs
John Peterson promised to show Katherine Austin Fitz a UFO if she would stop her research
Military USO encounters are twice as likely to involve electromagnetic interference compared to civilian encounters
USO encounters involving missing time or being sightings are four times as likely to report electromagnetic interference
About 10% of all USO cases involved electromagnetic interference
The Glomar Explorer recovered a sunken Soviet submarine from approximately three miles down in the Pacific Ocean in the 1970s
There has been a breakaway civilization funded by unaccounted government expenditures that has developed separate technology and potentially space capabilities
In the 1940s and early 1950s there were factions within the military that wanted openness on UFOs
The US government's accounting system is designed to be impossible to audit
